Lineup: Dirty Shame, Acoustic Station, Ante Up
Description: We're glad to keep the collaboration with Wild Heaven Avondale rolling — Dirty Shame, Acoustic Station, Ante Up, and the Bolo Boys back on Maple Street for about three and a half hours of music. We'll play inside or outside depending on the weather, but either way you can count on a good time: good music, good food, and good beer. Free, all ages — come hang out.

Lineup: Dirty Shame, Acoustic Station, Ante Up
Description: Another afternoon with our friends at Wild Heaven Avondale — Dirty Shame, Acoustic Station, Ante Up, and the Bolo Boys sharing the bill for three and a half hours of music. We'll be inside or outside depending on how September's treating us, but the good music, good food, and good beer are a sure thing. Free and open to everyone.
